entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: Hi Alexander

entry.title: Re: Make your Legacy SAP WM a Stock Room Management Compliant for WCU Interfaces
entry.content:
Prakash,

I wish to understand this compatibility in the world of S4/Hana of moving from WM to SRM.  We are happy with the functionality of WM and we DO NOT use the 7 areas of Yard Management, Task Management etc..

The compatibility check comes up with a Red traffic light for Warehouse Ctrl Unit Interface and yellow for 2 others.  What should be our next step?  Given the December 25 deadline on WM, given that we are NOT using any of these areas, do we really need to do anything to turn these red/yellow to green?

pshrikanth@gmail.com is my id - your help will be highly valuable!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!

entry.title: Hello everyone, I am currently working on PE51 and when I make entries in the window, I do not obtai
Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia

What is the difference between the 2 service bindigs.

Regards,

Dhruv

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Of course! As I know it is starting today!

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HC Professional Services - 2nd Approval Level f...
entry.content:
Hi @Christophe88,

Currently in S/4HANA Public cloud there is only 1 approver for 1 timesheet entry.

Please use the Continous Influence Program ( https://www.sap.com/about/customer-involvement/influence-adopt.sap-continuous-influence.html ) to have the functionality enhanced to allow 2 approver level for a timesheet entry

For the latest updates on the planned function capabilities, please refer to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud roadmap. Available under https://www.sap.com/roadmaps, the roadmap is updated quarterly.

Regards,
Monisha.

entry.title: Re: Issues creating Hana DB Free tier instance on Azure
entry.content: Hi Alexander, (sorry for the formatting, have not figured out how to work the enter button on this forum)... Thanks for the suggestion. Yes, there is usage listed, but the sub account has been deleted and the copy on the items reads "This subaccount was deleted sometime within the last 12 months. It's still listed here because it has registered usage during this period. Its usage was last reported in September 2024. Because the subaccount no longer exists, we cannot display its metadata, such as its path or labels." I think that lost connection message I received on the first invocation somehow orphaned the instance... I was also hoping some weekend clean up job might rectify this... but when I created a new sub account (I only have had one at a time) I still get the message there can only be one! Lol.. What ever is running and associated to azure(west), I cannot get to... either in multi-env or cf. BTW, entitlements for the free tier are listed and assigned. what is weird is I can create and destroy the free tier hana in Azure (east)... Anyway, not sure what to do here aside from waiting the time period when SAP will destroy the instance due to inactivity.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HC Professional Services - 2nd Approval Level f...

entry.title: Re: how to get all the dates enetered in the date range prompt in webi report even if not in DB tabl
entry.content: I don't have time to work out the details now, but you should be able to generated a list of your desired dates in a free-hand SQL statement with a CTE. Then merge that to your main query on the date.

entry.title: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currenty working on SAP PO 7.5 single stack SP28.. and we would like to upgrade to latest version available.. could you please let us know how do we find out the latest version of SAP PO.. also collecting the right versions for all components.. Also how do we check and conclude whether any security patch is needed for SAP PO environments? Could you please advise on this, Thank you!

Regards

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Net Working Cycle Time in SAP Signavio Process Intell...

entry.title: Re: How to access local classes inside a global class?
entry.content:
You can of course use local classes for attributes in your global class, e.g.

 data mo_substitution type ref to lcl_substitution.

You have to define them in the separate tab "Class-relevant Local Types" in Eclipse. In SAPGUI, you can access it via menu only: Goto / Local Definitions / Class relevant local definitions

entry.title: Re: Replication of HANA Views from on prem HANA to datasphere
entry.content: Thank you . Is there any way using SQL View input parameters mapping to HANA View?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content:
Hi @thorebedey ,

It would be interesting if you could share with us what kind of connection you made to make this workaround work.


For my part I share with you. I have the connection to the SAP Logon, type of connection SAP S/4HANA On-Premise, through this connection I have not been able to push down to the source.

And I have also failed to perform the RepFlow, I get an error that says “Please refer to SAP Note 2849542 for more information.
Replication Flows: Cause: ABAP connector(Axino) ABAP connection check FAILED: request failed: rc=1, msg=“Message: An invalid handle ‘RFC_CONNECTION_HANDLE’ was passed to the API call code: RFC_INVALID_HANDLE”.

 

But I have another connection, directly to SAP HANA Database, through which I have managed to push it down, it is the SAP HANA connection (Category On-Premise). Through the DataFlow, I have managed to perform PUSH DOWN by placing the filter in a projection.The only bad thing so far is that the Remote Table (CDS Views) do not load with the keys, and I can not use the Replication Flow.

entry.title: Re: Goods Movement Types
entry.content:
Dear Wenny,

I would recommend checking the KBA 3267640 - Error M7469 during posting in API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV.

Even though it is related to the error M7496, the cause and resolution could help you understand the GoodsMovementRefDocType maintenance in the API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV.

Kind Regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
@ulrich_mhrke

Yes you are right. I did check that and I have to add some code to come back to calling screen 400. Can you provide some tips/ help to go back to the screen? I have sequences of screens where output of the screen is based on selection of previous screen. So, It's challenging to jump directly on the screen. I do not want user to traverse again through screens 100, 200, 300 and again 400. I directly want user to land at screen 400 where he left off before.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps imageURL
entry.content:
Hello,

Unfortunately, I have not yet found a solution for this use case. Attempting to fetch images via SAP BTP destination has not been successful for me (404 error). Fetching static images or using external URLs (with authentication properly handled) is possible, but in my case, I aim to fetch images through a destination to manage authentication.

I will update you as soon as I find a solution for this issue.

Thank you.

Best regards,
Rafael

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – SAP Watch List Screening for Simplified Due Diligence and Compliance
entry.content:
Hello @RobOsbo,

Thank you for your question.

SAP Watch List Screening provides out-of-the-box support for the screening of sales orders, purchase orders, and a wide range of other documents.
A list of the supported documents can be found here:  
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/dfb1ceeb602c4a1dbde1171e3493209e/7cbc580df89b4b92b3711e88a654f79c.html?locale=en-US&version=2023.001

The customizing itself is part of S/4HANA International Trade.
Example Configuration: 
Open the  ProcessNavigator, then enter scope item 1WE in the SAP Signavio Process Navigator search field and select your desired version of the Restricted Party Screening with SAP Watch List Screening (1WE) solution process in solution scenario SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. Then, under keyblock Accelerators, select Test script. In this document, an example configuration is provided.

Best regards,
Valentin

I'll be dedicated to getting this certificate and making the best use of it.

 

Thanks 

Seun

entry.title: Two colons in PATH
entry.content:
After installing ASE 16.0 SP04 PL06, you will find the following entry in the SYBASE.sh script:

export PATH
PATH="/opt/ase160/ASE-16_0/bin:/opt/ase160/ASE-16_0/install:/opt/ase160/WLA/bin:":$PATH

After executing the script, the PATH variable looks like this:

PATH=/opt/ase160/ASE-16_0/bin:/opt/ase160/ASE-16_0/install:/opt/ase160/WLA/bin::/opt/ase160/ASE-16_0/bin

On Unix/Linux systems, two consecutive colons (::) in a PATH variable are interpreted as including the
current directory (.) in the search path for executables. This can pose a security risk, depending on the context.
A similar issue exists in SYBASE.csh. I understand this can be easily resolved by modifying SYBASE.sh or SYBASE.csh!

Is there a specific reason why the extra colon after $SYBASE/WLA/bin exists?
Should this behavior be addressed by removing or correcting it in the ASE setup.bin?

Thanks

Robert

entry.title: Re: RFC Callback Positive List Mass Activation
entry.content:
Depending on the release of your SAP system, there may be a possibility.

If SAL is activated in the system, and the profile parameter rfc/callback_security_method is set to "2", then in transaction SM59 you will find a button "Generate RFC Callback Allowlist".

Using that button, you can view recorded SAL entries and add them to the allow lists of multiple RFC Destinations.

entry.title: Re: Is it time to switch to OData v4?
entry.content:
Regarding incompatibility with RAP - is there a list of problematic elements you should avoid in your data definitions and in your code, so that you can run your SAP FIORI Elements app?

For example, I am struggling at the moment with floating numbers - the OData protocol is automatically set to ver. 4.01 which is unsupported by Fiori Elements. But you don't know why it changed to 4.01.

entry.title: Re: SAP PO version upgrade and security patch activity

entry.title: Re: Can the bank check configuration be changed to the same rule in different countries?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

The pre-delivered configuration in the SSCUI Set Country Specific Checks is the standard one accepted by each country. However, these configurations can be changed by the customer as per their requirement and it can be the same as other countries. 

Best Regards,

Aswathi

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Our own Bangalore Labs Campus Dog

entry.title: DMOVE2S4 – your one-step approach into the cloud
entry.content:
Highlights

DMOVE2S4 is a one-step solution provided by Software Update Manager that integrates the transition to the cloud with system maintenance. It supports products that are built on SAP S/4HANA and requires a strong and stable network for data transfer. 

 

Introducing DMOVE2S4

With Software Update Manager 2.0, SAP offers the swiss army knife for maintenance scenarios. It supports operating system and database migrations, software updates and upgrades, system conversions to SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition, as well as downtime-optimization scenarios for these tasks. 

Database Migration Option to SAP S/4HANA (on hyperscaler), short DMOVE2S4, is an offering by Software Update Manager for the seamless transition to RISE with SAP, combining the move from on-premise to the cloud with either a system conversion from SAP ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA or an update/upgrade of SAP S/4HANA as the following picture illustrates.

 

And the best part? DMOVE2S4 is built on the proven mechanisms of Software Update Manager, ensuring a smooth and reliable journey into the cloud. Those who are familiar with DMO know, that there are two approaches which differ (not only) in their means of data transfer: 

  • DMO – transfers data base on memory pipes 
  • DMO with System Move (⚠️ not to be confused with DMOVE2S4) – transfers data based on data files 

For DMOVE2S4, the approach Database Migration Option (DMO) with system maintenance (either system conversion or upgrade) is combined with the move to a hyperscaler. Sounds simple but offers amazing results: You can do your move to the cloud in one step with the system maintenance and are ready to go. This also means, that DMOVE2S4 is not a separate selection in the Software Update Manager User Interface. On top, DMOVE2S4 can be combined with downtime-optimized DMO as well as downtime-optimized Conversion. It is worth mentioning that the DMOVE2S4 approach can also be used for moving to the cloud even without updating or upgrading your SAP S/4HANA system, although other transfer methods such as tenant copy of SAP HANA may be more suitable in such cases.

To benefit from DMOVE2S4 following prerequisites must be considered: 

  • Only target products based on SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Foundation are supported. 
  • The Network connection must be sufficient*.

*Please refer to the latest DMO Guide for details.

If the prerequisites cannot be met, Software Update Manager also got your back with DMO with System Move. The approach also allows for a smooth transition to the cloud; however, it cannot be combined with downtime-optimization approaches such as downtime-optimized DMO or downtime-optimized Conversion. 

For further information please refer to the following links: 

DMO Guide: DMO Move to SAP S/4HANA (on Hyperscaler) | SAP Help Portal 

SAP Note: 3431829 - Database Migration Option (DMO) of SUM 2.0 SP20, section g) 

SAP HANA Guide: Copying and Moving Tenant Databases (without software change)

 

Questions? Feedback? Concerns? Comment below and let us know!

entry.title: Crystal Reports License
entry.content:
Hi, about the licensing Crystal Reports, currently we have one developer who will be responsible for creating the reports, compile, and distribute the executable with embedded reports to our customer base (multiple clients), the developer will compile more than one application, but all from one only machine, so my question is: buying 1x ( SAP Crystal Reports 2020 (64 bits), 1 user ), will we be in agreement with the license ?

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: Is it time to switch to OData v4?
entry.content:
Hi Mike,

in some situations, i can overcome the hazzle of using json by using odata props, but beeing able to use it just locally:

 

<StepInput value="{ path: 'MinimumOrderQuantity', targetType: 'int', mode: 'OneWay', formatter: '.formatter.valueOrOne' }" />

 

using mode: 'OneWay' allows me to manipulate the property without sending autoupdates to the backend. 
Since v4, i try as much as possible to get rid of json and to benefit from side effects annotations.
But you can use a v4 context programmatically 
var oContext = oModel.createBindingContext("/EMPLOYEES('1'));
and set properties followed by mode.submitBatch() or using groupId "Direct" instead "Auto".

Currently, i do not miss any additional important feature.

Regards Holger

entry.title: Bill 96 Language Requirements - System suggestions
entry.content:

  1. Did you add new fields to capture the data into the position and recruiting?  are you capturing the data outside of the system in some way?  Any information would be appreciated

  2. How do you collect, organize, and present the necessary data required by the government every third year?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How do you reverse engineer a JSON or API end-point t...
entry.content:
I have done this quite many times and did basically same thing like you.

Either "reverse engineer" JSON and build local TYPEs (deep structures). Or if I was lucky then I followed Swagger/OpenAPI documentation provided for a REST API.

Another thing to note is that in SAP world the API is often OData and that has much more options.

entry.title: Re: changing default report layout in sap b1
entry.content:
Hi,

We were experiencing something similar, receiving a -10 (Internal error (-10) occurred) error when trying to set the default report for all users and a specific customer not being a super user.

We tried leaving out the UserID property, using an empty string and null values, and what worked for us was using "-1" for UserID.

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content: Sorry if I ask you stupid questions. Do you have in BTP the Master data instances running and set for every single system? For BP sync using soap there are more steps to be done, like create at least 2 more destinations.

entry.title: KNVK Custom extractor not able to identify delta records
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

we have custom extractor  to extract KNVK ( Customer contacts) in ECC system as we don't have any standard extractor.( BW team is saying so  😞  )

However as KNVK table does not have change fields, So BW team is running the extractor in  FULL Load mode (weekly once) to keep the data in sync. which is causing the huge processing delays in downstream.

 In ECC we have change pointers active and i can see that changes are getting captured in BDCP2 (Aggregated Change Pointers (BDCP, BDCPS))

So my concerns are

1) where is the best place to  filter KNVK to filter only delta records ?

2) in our BW system also we have BDCP2 but it is empty.

3) if we write logic in BW extractor  FM in ABAP layer, will it impact the performance of the  extractor?

4) any way to handle this in BW ?

 

Thanks 

Murthy

entry.content: Hi Share,

entry.content: This happens when select-options refer to fields of a CDS view.

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content: @cadarica, yes i have created instances for s4 and subscription billing, and also i have creted one destination taking the api from SAP_COM_0008 inbound services with this option Business Partner - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud and destination works fine as well as mentioned previously, are there any additional steps ? i understand that we need to create one more destination, but my issue is why the destination is not showing up in MDO in consumer ? could you pleas e help ?

entry.title: Re: Add custom fields to Manage Supplier Line Items app Fiori - Mass Change View
entry.content: Hi how are things? Could you find a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Report selection text disappear after transport
entry.content: See the edited description: do not refer to CDS-Views in select-options.

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:
Hello @Hemang, 

SAP Landscape Management Cloud already got removed as external offering. Existing contracts are honoured until their expiry date. It's described at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-landscape-management-cloud-discontinued/ba-p/13759530. 

Kind regards,
Marco

entry.title: GL creation date in SAP ByD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How can we find the creation date of a GL account in SAP ByD? 

Thanks,

chindhu

entry.title: Re: ABAP in Cloud environment cl_gui_frontend_services
entry.content: For OData V4, you can use annotation @Semantics.largeObject.

entry.title: Re: Manage Material Valuations App on S/4HANA Cloud, Publ...
entry.content:
Hi Evrim,

You are using the correct Fiori app for this functionality but, unfortunately, the upload function is only available for price changes (old tcode MR21), not for debit/credit material (old tcode MR22).

I would recommend develop an application using the FM BAPI_MATVAL_DEBIT_CREDIT, although this is only available for private cloud version.

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe Magalhães

entry.title: Re: me59n not working after EPH8
entry.content: At me53n is empty but in the agreement , me33k has a storage location.

entry.title: Re: me59n not working after EPH8
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: Tax amounts not getting updated in table ETXDCJ
entry.content: Same issue here, I don't see the answer anywhere. any possible update?

entry.title: Re: A few updates from SAP Business One Support
entry.content:
Hello Karol and Supporthij, 

I have sent you a message. I would like to get in contact so that we can look at what is not working with the downloads. 

If someone else have the same issue please leave a message here or send a message to my inbox. 

Thanks,

Jesper

entry.title: Re: Two colons in PATH
entry.content:
Looks like a mistake/typo on behalf of the individual(s) responsible for putting together the ASE distribution package.

This issue also exists in my oldest ASE installation (ASE 16.0 SP03 PL07) so it appears to have been introduced at least a few years ago.

A few simple grep calls against an extracted ASE distribution package doesn't show any clear/obvious way to fix this prior to running setup.bin so it looks like you're limited to updating the SYBASE.* files after running setup.bin.

If you have a maintenance contract I'd suggest opening a ticket with tech support to get this fixed for future releases.  If we're lucky maybe tech support will put out a KBA/fix for the older versions where this is occurring.

entry.title: Re: BPC complexe input form
entry.content:
Hello Bastien,

For several comments - use BW info objects with concatenation
Master on the fly - this is possible with ABAP managed planning functions. You can initialize the new planning template with existing as well as new data
Input the several date - This should be possible with customer exit variables with i_step to populate the date according to business requirement.

Thanks!

Regards,
Mandar

entry.title: Re: SCP Credential Store - get password/public key from V...
entry.content:
I had the same problem using mTLS as authentication method, i think the example does not show this case, and it is unclear how to usew the provided parameters. I see, that username is given, but noch useable - maye as a different header field?

for now I updated the credstore with
{"authentication":{"type":"basic"}}

(created/changed in webinterface/BTP, second step to provide custom config.

now the application gets username/password for Basic-Auth header, useable in the example code.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: I have these three babies! Her names are Temaki, Sashimi, and Watermelon !

entry.title: Re: WCM Control Key
entry.content: Hi Matjaz , Thanks for your reply . Basically I need to implement Permit to Work features . For this , what I need to do ? Is WCM feature applicable on S4 Hana cloud environment ?
